ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_num" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the sale took place */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sale took place */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department (e.g., Baby, Furniture) */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item sold */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "loyalty" INTEGER /* Loyalty status of the customer */,
  "first_purchase" TEXT /* Date of the customer's first purchase */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Purchase frequency of the customer */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coupon used (if any) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "order_total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_num"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., East US) */,
  "region_manager" TEXT /* Name of the regional manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the store is located */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store (e.g., East US Store 19) */,
  "store_address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "store_manager" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_manager" TEXT /* Name of the department manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the item belongs */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item (e.g., Cribs, Diapers) */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., sales associate, manager) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the employee works */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "loyalty" INTEGER /* Loyalty status of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the item is located */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the item in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id", "store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_summary" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales for the department in the region */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of items sold in the department in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_purchases" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_num" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "order_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_performance" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales made by the employee */,
  "average_sale" REAL /* Average sale value made by the employee */,
  "sales_target" REAL /* Sales target for the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "reward_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for earning rewards */,
  "reward_value" REAL /* Value of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_memberships" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loyalty program */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "loyalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupons" (
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coupon */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Code for the coupon */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount amount for the coupon */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the coupon expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coupon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_reviews_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
